content: [P0-1] Tạo src/api/routes/ package — split routes.py thành config, shop, tickets, community, embeds modules
[P0-2] Update src/api/routes/__init__.py — main router include tất cả sub-routers
[P0-3] Update imports trong routes.py (root) và app.py
[P0-4] Add response_mode + text_template columns to EmbedTemplate model + ALTER TABLE
[P0-5] Update build_embed() → build_response() trả về embed hoặc text tùy config
[P0-6] Verify server khởi động OK + test API endpoints
